name: PNW Golf Academy - Issaquah
about: PNW Golf Academy is a premier indoor/outdoor golf training facility in Issaquah, Washington, featuring multiple locations including Issaquah, Seattle, and Newcastle. The academy is equipped with state-of-the-art technology, utilizing Trackman radar and high-speed video analysis to provide detailed swing analysis and personalized instruction for golfers of all skill levels. Cloud-based storage provides 24/7 access to swing videos and progress tracking. The facility offers various lesson packages, memberships, and corporate event options, with a team of experienced instructors including former Division I golfers and PGA professionals. Their focus is on personalized instruction, player development, and providing the tools and environment for golfers to improve their game.
why_golfers_like_it: Cutting-edge Trackman technology for precise swing analysis and data-driven improvement
Cloud-based video storage providing 24/7 access to personal progress and lesson recaps
Team of expert instructors with competitive backgrounds and personalized teaching philosophies
Multiple locations offering both indoor simulator and outdoor practice capabilities
Comprehensive services including club fitting, corporate events, and junior programs

food_and_drink.notes: No on-site food service mentioned. BYOB not indicated.
No on-site bar or alcohol service mentioned.

simulator_hardware.notes: Multiple Trackman units across indoor facilities for lessons, practice, and fitting services.

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: The academy provides all necessary equipment for lessons and practice, though golfers are welcome to use their own clubs. Club fitting services are also available using Trackman technology.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The website does not mention any on-site food and beverage service or BYOB policies. It is recommended to confirm directly with the venue if planning to bring outside food or drinks.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes on a simulator?
faq.answer: The website does not specify a typical time for 18 holes. simulator rental pricing suggests hourly rates, with a 1-hour lesson costing $140-$220 depending on the day and location.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, PNW Golf Academy offers junior golf programs, summer camps for ages 6-18, and junior lesson pricing, making it a kid-friendly environment. The facility is equipped to train junior golfers of all skill levels.
